query: dogfood test this skill I'm developing — does it trigger and behave right?

run a behavioral dogfood on this skill: cold-reader + executor + auditor passes
blind-test my skill end to end and report over-trigger / missed-trigger / cold-start defects

新しい SKILL.md を実行ベースでドッグフードして、誤発火・未発火・コールドスタートを点検したい
Score this SKILL.md against the 8-dimension rubric and tell me where it loses points

Create a brand-new skill from scratch for me
